creator: freebsd.bug@nagykeve.e4ward.com
text:
This project seems to be abandoned.
I e-mailed the indicated official maintainer, received no response.
If anybody takes over, my offer below still stands. As long as I have those computers.

Regards,
Keve

-------- Original Message --------
From: keve@xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
To: cy@FreeBSD.xxx
Subject: fbsd bug 218579 - bge(4): Wake on Lan (WoL) does not work
Date: Sun, 3 Sep 2023 12:35:13 +0200

Hello Cy Schubert,
I have a HP T610 Thin Client and a HP MicroServer N40L, both with an on-board bge interface. I am happy to run tests for you, or can even provide you with an ssh access to these machines. Let me know if any of that helps you in taking the bge-WOL issue further.

Regards,
Keve Nagy * Debrecen * Hungary
